patterns_recognized: HARD CAP 7 near-zero over-fire (third consecutive slate observation): Three picks today fire CAP 7 at sub-0.010 gaps — TOR@ATL (+0.0049), PIT@HOU (+0.0018), LAD@ARI (+0.0047). Per 5/30 archive: TEX@KC +0.0019 also over-fired. At gaps below 0.010 the bullpen quality differential is economically indistinguishable from zero. Calibration toward |gap|>=0.010 minimum trigger would reduce over-firing without compromising protection on meaningful disadvantages.

HARD CAP 10 pick_prob grading discrepancy (potential pipeline bug): Grade_reasons show stale pick_prob values inconsistent with CSV — SD@PHI 0.540 vs CSV 0.5762; TEX@STL 0.529 vs CSV 0.56; KC@CIN 0.534 vs CSV 0.5667. Picks with actual pick_prob outside (0.50, 0.55] may have had CAP 10 fire incorrectly, suppressing A-grade pre-cap signals (SD@PHI pre_cap=5, TEX@STL pre_cap=5). Investigate whether the grading pipeline caches an earlier pick_prob snapshot rather than the final CSV value.

Large f5_full_delta with positive hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap = carry thesis at risk (5/26 archive rule, confirmed again): LAD@ARI has f5_full_delta=0.2817 (ARI wins F5 at 89%) with hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0047 (ARI pen slightly worse). Per 5/26 learning: only treat large f5_full_delta as bullpen-carry conviction when the gap is NEGATIVE (pick side pen is better). Positive gap with large delta = DOWNGRADE signal, not CONFIRM.

PQI-vs-bullpen carry conflict resolution: MIA@WSH has hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0109 (WSH pen better, normally supports carry) but PQI=-30.6 strongly opposes WSH late-game. When PQI delta > 25pp against the carry pick AND bullpen_fatigue fires, PQI overrides the hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap presumption. The model's post-starter quality index is more granular than raw xwOBA and should take precedence in extreme cases.

DET @ TB.reasoning: D-grade (-1) with SP xERA against TB: Jack Flaherty (DET away) has 0.35 xERA advantage over Steven Matz (TB home). Negative edge (-4.08pp) and no F-signals. DET is 23-38 (.377) vs TB 36-21 (.632) — TB team quality supports direction but SP headwind and negative edge correctly prevent stake. Process-correct SKIP; no qualitative context changes the cap disposition.

SD @ PHI.reasoning: Pre-cap score=5 (A): Aaron Nola over Randy Vásquez by 1.76 xERA, F1_xera_gap=2.02, PQI=+23.1 confirms PHI, Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.00). Edge=+1.86pp below 4pp staking floor — binding constraint. Note: grade_reasons show HARD CAP 10 triggered with pick_prob=0.540, but CSV shows 0.5762 (outside the (0.50,0.55] band) — possible pipeline caching discrepancy. Regardless, edge gate is dispositive. PHI direction is strong.

BAL @ BOS.reasoning: No F-signals, pre_cap_score=1 (B-) with no SP edge and PQI slightly against BAL (-2.8). Pick_prob=0.5081 (bottom bucket). Shane Baz (BAL away) vs Connelly Early (BOS home). BAL 28-32, BOS 25-33 — both struggling. Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.02). HARD CAP 10 correctly fires. No compelling reason to rescue this near-coin-flip with weak conviction.

MIA @ WSH.reasoning: DOWNGRADE to SKIP: SP is 1.88 xERA AGAINST WSH (Lake Bachar >> Miles Mikolas). PQI=-30.6 strongly contradicts the carry thesis — among the most extreme PQI headwinds on today's slate. f5_full_delta=0.293 is the slate's largest: MIA dominates F5 at 74%, requiring WSH bullpen to fully carry. Bullpen_fatigue stress flag undermines that carry. When PQI delta > 25pp against pick AND bullpen_fatigue fires, PQI overrides the hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap carry presumption.

CLE @ NYY.reasoning: Pre-cap score=4 (A-): F1_xera_gap=2.56, F2_xwoba_gap=0.028, F3_swing_take_gap=6791.0, PQI=+20.8 — all confirming NYY. NYY 36-23 at home vs CLE 34-27 on road. Market prices NYY at 70.4% (fair_prob=0.704) vs model's 66.83% — market already more confident in NYY. HARD CAP 1 correctly prevents stake (edge=-3.56pp). Direction is strong; no qualitative override needed.

KC @ CIN.reasoning: F2+F3 fire but no F1; PQI slightly against CIN (-4.6). f5_full_delta=0.153: KC dominates F5 at 58.6%, CIN carry via pen (hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.002, marginal). Acute_roster stress. Edge=+2.42pp below 4pp floor — binding constraint. Andrew Abbott (CIN home) vs Noah Cameron (KC away). Pre_cap_score=1 (B-) is low conviction. CONFIRM SKIP; edge gate is dispositive.

TOR @ ATL.reasoning: CONFIRM (staked). Pre-cap score=7 (A) with F2_xwoba_gap=0.032 and F3_swing_take_gap=7765.9 both firing; PQI=+6.9 confirms ATL. ATL at 40-20 (.667) at home vs TOR 29-31 (.483). HARD CAP 7 fires at hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0049 — near-zero (below 0.010 meaningful threshold), likely over-firing per 5/30 archive. Kevin Gausman (TOR) has SP quality edge but ATL's lineup strength and home-field advantage overcome it. Edge=+4.28pp in band.

CHW @ MIN.reasoning: Davis Martin (CHW away, F1*=1.29+F2) vs Connor Prielipp (MIN home). CHW 32-28 (.533) vs MIN 28-33 (.459). PQI confirms CHW (+11.3 CHW advantage). Stage 1/2 disagree (f5_full_delta=0.105): MIN wins F5 at 65%, CHW carry via pen (gap=-0.0048). Edge=+0.68pp far below staking floor. Davis Martin validated directionally on 5/28 (6-2 CHW win). CONFIRM SKIP — edge gate is binding.

SF @ MIL.reasoning: Kyle Harrison (MIL home) vs Trevor McDonald (SF away). F3+SP edge 0.66+PQI=+18 all confirm MIL. hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=-0.0062 (MIL pen better, supports carry). f5_full_delta=0.2023 with negative pen gap = bullpen-carry conviction (per 5/26 rule). Edge=-12.6pp: market already prices MIL at 66.38% vs model's 53.78% — HARD CAP 1 EV-protecting against inferior-odds stake. MIL at 36-21 (.632) is a strong home team.

TEX @ STL.reasoning: Pre-cap score=5 (A): F3_swing_take_gap=1912.6, SP edge 0.33 xERA (Dustin May over Eovaldi), PQI=+13.2, Stage 1/2 agree (Δ=0.01). STL 31-27 at home. HARD CAP 10 grade_reasons show pick_prob=0.529 but CSV shows 0.56 (outside (0.50,0.55] band) — possible pipeline discrepancy; if 0.56 is correct, A-grade pre-cap should hold. Regardless, why_skipped='tier GOLD->stake_mult=0' prevents staking today. STL direction is strongly supported.

OAK @ CHC.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA: Gage Jump (OAK away) has only 88 Statcast pitches, below the 100-pitch scoring threshold. Jameson Taillon (CHC home) is confirmed via API. Cannot score the game without sufficient Gage Jump Statcast data. No directional pick. Process-correct SKIP per thin-SP-data protocol.

PIT @ HOU.reasoning: Pre-cap score=3 (B+) before HARD CAP 7 (+0.0018, near-zero, likely over-firing). Edge=+15.06pp misses the ≤15pp ceiling by 0.06pp — edge gate is binding regardless. Mike Burrows (HOU home) vs Bubba Chandler (PIT away); SP edge 0.50 xERA agrees with HOU. HOU 27-34 (.443) vs PIT 32-28 (.533). Despite strong model conviction at 66.83%, the edge ceiling prevents stake.

COL @ LAA.reasoning: Grayson Rodriguez (LAA home) dominates Tomoyuki Sugano (COL away) by 3.23 xERA — among the strongest SP edges on today's slate. PQI=+22 confirms LAA, F3 fires. But edge=-10.14pp: market prices LAA at 61.33% vs model's 51.19% — market has already absorbed this SP advantage. HARD CAP 1 correctly prevents staking at inferior model odds. Both teams are 23-38 (.377), making the LAA home+SP edge the deciding factor.

LAD @ ARI.reasoning: DOWNGRADE to SKIP: Sole F-signal is F1_xera_gap=1.86* (thin-sample asterisk on Michael Soroka). f5_full_delta=0.2817 with hl_bullpen_xwoba_gap=+0.0047 (ARI pen slightly worse) — per 5/26 rule, large f5_full_delta with positive pen gap signals carry thesis at risk. LAD at 38-22 (.633) vs ARI 32-27 (.542); LAD's elite lineup (Ohtani, Freeman) can overcome thin-sample Soroka in late innings. Team_quality_mod=-1 (LAD superior). Thin-sample primary driver + positive pen gap + LAD quality = DOWNGRADE.

NYM @ SEA.reasoning: PENDING_SP_DATA: NYM probable pitcher not yet announced (TBD per MLB API). Logan Gilbert confirmed as SEA home SP. Cannot issue a directional pick until NYM starter is announced and Statcast-scored (100+ pitches required). Process-correct SKIP.
